perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and sunglasses on her head stands outdoors on a sidewalk, speaking directly to the camera in a selfie-style shot. She wears a patterned low-cut top and has an expressive facial expression. (2) Behind her, a row of parked scooters, green trees, and city buildings are visible. (3) She maintains eye contact with the camera throughout, gesturing slightly and changing her facial expressions to emphasize her questions and observations.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaking Mandarin Chinese begins immediately, maintaining a curious and energetic tone throughout. (2) There is a persistent background drilling or construction noise that competes with the vocal track. (3) Ambient city sounds, including distant traffic, are audible beneath the speech and construction noise. No background music is present.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 我發現台灣 (Functional: I found that Taiwan - Curious tone). (2) 有一個很奇怪的現象 (Functional: there's a very strange phenomenon - Emphatic). (3) (我真的想不通) (Decorative: I really can't figure it out - Confused tone). (4) 就是路上的胖子 (Functional: that is the fat people on the street - Informative). (5) 真的好少喔 (Functional: are really so few - Surprised tone). (6) 明明美食那麼多 (Functional: Clearly there's so much delicious food - Observational). (7) (我一直吃一直吃) (Decorative: I keep eating and eating - Humorous tone). (8) 為什麼胖子可以那麼少 (Functional: Why can there be so few fat people? - Questioning). (9) (我才來第二天就胖1kg了) (Decorative: I've only been here two days and gained 1kg - Self-deprecating humor). (10) 什麼秘訣? (Functional: What's the secret? - Curious). (11) 可以告訴我嗎? (Functional: Can you tell me? - Pleading). (12) (求你們了) (Decorative: I beg you guys - Dramatic/Humorous tone).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Observation -> Questioning -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long dark hair, heavy makeup, wearing a patterned camisole and sunglasses perched on her head.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A city sidewalk with trees, many parked scooters (mopeds), and urban buildings in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a personal observation about the low obesity rate in Taiwan and engage viewers by asking for their 'secrets' or explanations for this phenomenon.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Selfie-style vlog with expressive text overlays containing personal subtext in parentheses.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a relatable personal anecdote (gaining weight while traveling) to spark interaction from a local audience.
